title: ochrocarpos tinctorius
intro: Ochrocarpos tinctorius, also known as the Indian wood fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ochrocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ochrocarpos tinctorius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and digestive disorders.
